posts.title: Enable vi keybinding in zsh
posts.text: Add pluginFirst, you need add vi-mode plugin in zsh. .zshrc12345plugin={ ... vi-mode ...} Remap ESCUse the ESC key for leaving insert mode is not that efficient, because you need to leave the home row. I prefer remap ECS to jk keys, you can remap it whatever you want. .zshrc1bindkey 'jk' vi-cmd-mode
